code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        mut sign = 1
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
        mut num = 0
        mut consuming = true
        while consuming
          if i >= n
            consuming = false
          else
            match string.byte_at(line, i)
            when Some(c)
              if c >= 48 and c <= 57
                num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
                i = i + 1
              else
                consuming = false
              end
            when None
              consuming = false
            end
          end
        end
        result = list.push(result, num * sign)
      end
    when None
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(sorted, x)
      mut new_list: List<Int> = []
      mut inserted = false
      for y in sorted
        if not inserted and x < y
          new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        new_list = list.push(new_list, y)
      end
      if not inserted
        new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
      end
      sorted = new_list
    end
  end
  sorted
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()

let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
mut combined = nums1
for x in parse_ints(line2)
  combined = list.push(combined, x)
end

let result = sort_unique(combined)

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in result
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
